title: How to Watch TWICE Perform on the ‘Tonight Show’ With Jimmy Fallon Online Free
summary: The K-pop group's appearance comes on the heels of their 'THIS IS FOR' World Tour, which is traveling across North America now.
body: All products and services featured are independently chosen by editors. However, Billboard may receive a commission on orders placed through its retail links, and the retailer may receive certain auditable data for accounting purposes. TWICE are heading back to New York City for another late-night talk show appearance . The K-pop group is set to appear on the Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon on Monday (Feb. 23) with the episode airing at 11:35 p.m. ET/PT on NBC. Nayeon, Jeongyeon, Momo, Sana, Jihyo, Mina, Dahyun, Chaeyoung and Tzuyu will be the special musical guests for the show, which often tapes in the afternoon before airing at night. Not much else has been revealed as of this writing, and neither the group nor the show have announced what song they will be singing and whether or not the girls will join Fallon for an interview. How to Watch TWICE Tonight Show Performance Watch to watch TWICE on the Tonight Show? You can watch Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon on TV with any basic cable package that includes an NBC feed.
